title: Fertilizer Enchant
description: This adds an enchantment which replants seeds when broken
body:
# Fertilizer Enchant
Heyy, this is a simple datapack that adds a new enchantment for the hoe that will replant any seed that is broken
<details>
<summary>1.21</summary>
  
## How does it work
Simple, you break seeds and it will replant it but what does this enchantment actually do?
- Whenever you break a seed it will reduce the amount you receive by one and replant that seed where it was broken
- Works on all seeds including melon and pumpkin stems and nether wart
- Only works on the hoe

## How to obtain the enchantment
The enchantment is found in the enchanting table, via trading with villagers and on random loot.

</details>


## Important message
This datapack is the start of a new project of mine which will include more enchants. Don't hesitate to share any feedback you have

**All my datapacks are compatible**

**You can modify this datapack to your likings. However, I would appreciate if you could credit me if you use my base code, thank you!**

## Planned in the future: The higher on the list, the sooner
- Configuration menu in game
